ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shareholders" (
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shareholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shareholder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shareholder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the shareholder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the shareholder */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of shareholder (e.g., individual, institutional investor) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shareholder is active */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number for the shareholder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shareholder record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shareholder record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shareholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownership_details" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "shareholder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shareholder */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the ownership */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "class_of_shares" TEXT /* Class of shares (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "sole_voting_power" REAL /* Sole voting power of the shareholder */,
  "shared_voting_power" REAL /* Shared voting power of the shareholder */,
  "sole_dispositive_power" REAL /* Sole dispositive power of the shareholder */,
  "shared_dispositive_power" REAL /* Shared dispositive power of the shareholder */,
  "aggregate_amount_owned_power" REAL /* Aggregate amount of shares owned by the shareholder */,
  "percent_of_class" TEXT /* Percentage of the class of shares owned by the shareholder */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership details became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership details expire (if applicable) */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the ownership */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ownership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ownership record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_details_shareholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("shareholder_id") REFERENCES shareholders ("shareholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownership_details_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, compliance officer, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)
